title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce reveal scary reality before wedding
description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are no strangers to performing under pressure, regularly facing crowds of more than 70,000 people. Kelce recently admitted that the adrenaline of rising to the occasion in packed stadiums is something he will deeply miss after retirement. Swift experiences similar intensity during her Eras Tour, proving that performing before massive audiences can inspire excellence rather than fear.
